series_metadata.series_title: Golden Buckeye Card Records – including Ohio BMV Records
series_metadata.series_description: Golden Buckeye Card Records, including individual Ohio BMV Records; to assist with the automated issuance of Golden Buckeye cards.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 80 years from the date of receiving Ohio BMV Record(s). The BMV Registrar needs to be notified of the destruction of any Ohio BMV records. Contacts for the BMV Register can be found at https://publicsafety.ohio.gov/local-office or by calling 614-443-5100. ; Paper: 80 years from the date of receiving Ohio BMV Record(s). The BMV Registrar needs to be notified of the destruction of any Ohio BMV records. Contacts for the BMV Register can be found at https://publicsafety.ohio.gov/local-office or by calling 614-443-5100., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
